title: Magenta Diamonds
body:
**_English_**

Magenta Diamonds <33

All diamond textures turn magenta.

## What will exactly change?

- Diamond 
- Diamond sword
- Diamond axe
- Diamond pickaxe
- Diamond shovel
- Diamond hoe
- Diamond helmet
- Diamond chestplate
- Diamond leggings
- Diamond boots
- Diamond horse armour 
- Block of diamond
- Diamond ore
- Deepslate diamond ore
- Also it changes the texture of the enchanting table
- The armor trims turn also turn purple

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c2d00102b2c154a7dcfb9769abe6483512de0a.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**_Deutsch_**

Magentafarbene Diamanten <33

Alle Diamanttexturen werden zu magenta.

## Was ändert sich genau?

- Diamant 
- Diamant-Schwert
- Diamant-Axt
- Diamant-Spitzhacke
- Diamant-Schaufel
- Diamant-Hacke
- Diamant-Helm
- Diamant-Brustplatte
- Diamant-Hosen
- Diamant-Stiefel
- Diamant-Pferderüstung 
- Diamant-Block
- Diamant-Erz
- Deepslate Diamantenerz
- Außerdem ändert sich die Textur des Verzauberungstisches
- Die Rüstungsteile färben sich ebenfalls lila

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c2d00102b2c154a7dcfb9769abe6483512de0a.png)
